subcodes.title: Words to a French Bahá’í, spoken on 1913-05-14
subcodes.first_line: The world of matter is full of vices and the people of these regions are engaged too much in chasing material things. They are thinking too much of money and the tinsels and playthings they can buy with it.
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @spiritual transformation, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @fulfillment of true potential
